The Information reports that AI operators are facing more pressure to prove governance discipline before internal pilots expand into core business systems.

Subscriber-only content

Executives increasingly want to know who can override a model-driven workflow, what evidence is logged after an incident, and how quickly a rollout can be rolled back.

Already a subscriber?

That is pushing teams to document human approvals, fallback procedures, and review checkpoints much earlier in the deployment process.

Read more from The Information
